module.title: SAP TM Freight Settlement & Charge Management

learningObjectives.title: Understand settlement monitoring
learningObjectives.description: Explain real-time tracking of settlement lifecycle and payment progress.

learningObjectives.title: Understand settlement analytics
learningObjectives.description: Describe KPI-based analysis for cost optimization and carrier performance.

learningObjectives.title: Differentiate monitoring vs analytics
learningObjectives.description: Clarify current operational tracking versus historical trend analysis.

sections.content: Freight Settlement Monitoring enables logistics and finance teams to track the complete settlement lifecycle from charge calculation to carrier payment. SAP TM provides dashboards, analytical reports and KPIs that help organizations monitor settlement accuracy, payment status, carrier performance and transportation costs.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Monitoring ensures that every Freight Settlement Document is processed correctly, while analytics help optimize transportation costs and carrier performance.

A logistics manager reviews the monthly settlement dashboard and discovers that one carrier consistently submits invoices requiring manual corrections. The analytics reveal a high mismatch rate, prompting contract review and process improvements with the carrier.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Review settlement KPIs regularly to identify payment bottlenecks, recurring invoice discrepancies and opportunities for transportation cost optimization.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global logistics provider implemented SAP TM settlement analytics and reduced average settlement processing time from seven days to less than three days by identifying recurring approval bottlenecks.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Know the difference between monitoring and analytics. Monitoring focuses on current settlement status, while analytics focuses on trends, KPIs and business improvement.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Do not rely only on settlement completion. Regular KPI analysis is essential for identifying cost-saving opportunities and improving carrier performance.

items: Settlement Monitoring tracks Freight Settlement Documents and payments.
Analytics provide insights into transportation costs and carrier performance.
KPIs measure settlement efficiency and invoice accuracy.
Dashboards support operational and management decisions.
Continuous monitoring improves financial and logistics performance.
